Description: A view of the Court of the Lions in the Alhambra Palace in Granada, showing detailed Islamic arches and a marble fountain with lion statues.
Old stone ruins from the Angkor temple area in Cambodia, with carved walls and tall temple buildings in bright sunlight.
A wide view of the Colosseum in Rome during sunset, with warm golden light illuminating the ancient stone arches.
A strong view of the Sk—gafoss waterfall in Iceland, with green cliffs around it and mist rising from the falling water.
A panoramic view of the Old City of Jerusalem, featuring the Al-Aqsa Mosque, the golden Dome of the Rock, and the historic stone walls with the modern skyline in the background.
A vibrant scene at the Izmir Clock Tower in Konak Square, with palm trees, pigeons, and people enjoying the sunny day around the historic landmark.
A strong view of AntarcticaŐs icy mountains rising above the cold ocean, with snowy peaks, glaciers, and pieces of ice floating on the water.
Ulun Danu Beratan Temple in Bali, built on small islands on Lake Beratan, surrounded by calm water and green mountains.
A busy night scene in Times Square in New York City, with bright signs, yellow taxis, and many people walking on the lit-up streets.
A clear daytime view of Big Ben and the Palace of Westminster in London, with people and cars crossing Westminster Bridge under a bright blue sky.
